form.formComment: Resuming. Only had one start last campaign raced on the pace when 3rd of 13 at this track Bm65 on January 6 over 1000m, slow going 1.5 len behind Singular with 59kg at $4.80. First up last campaign 3rd of 9 at this track Cl3 on January 18 2025 over 1000m, 1.0 len behind Booming Lad with 61kg at $4.80. Finished fourth in a Townsville trial over 850m on March 31. This is an ideal race to kick off. Sure to go well.

Major player on best form.
